overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a dense coniferous forest at night. The journey progresses from deep woodland through forest edges with mountain vistas, culminating at a river shoreline where the character enters the water under a dark, cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the dark forest, sword strapped to his back, navigating between tall pine trees

entered.detail: Dense tall coniferous trees forming the forest canopy
Green grass and low undergrowth covering the forest floor
Bare dead trees scattered among the living pines
Thick tree cover blocking most of the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense forest at night, with tall pine trees surrounding the path. The camera follows Geralt from behind as he walks through the narrow enclosed space, with grassy terrain underfoot and dead trees visible to the left. The sky is mostly obscured by the thick canopy overhead.

events.description: forest opens up revealing mountain range in the distance as trees thin out

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing forward as the forest opens up, walking across grassy hills with mountains now visible ahead

entered.detail: Dark silhouetted mountains visible through the clearing trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the forest opens up, the scene transitions to a wider landscape with partial sky visibility. The mountain range becomes visible in the distance center-frame, while the dense canopy exits the view. The vegetation becomes more moderate as Geralt walks across grassy terrain toward the vista.

events.description: character steps from grassy riverbank into the flowing water

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the river and stepping into the water, creating ripples as he wades in

entered.detail: Dark flowing river with visible current and reflective surface
Stones and rocks lining the edge of the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a wide river under the overcast night sky. The river water enters the frame from the distance and grows closer as Geralt walks forward. The character steps from the grassy bank into the water around the 55-second mark, transitioning from land to water as the mountains remain visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a nocturnal coniferous forest toward the open expanse of a river shoreline. It begins behind Geralt as he navigates a narrow path enclosed by tall pine trees and dead wood, with the thick canopy almost entirely obscuring the night sky. As the forest opens up, the dense overhead foliage recedes to reveal a wider landscape and a distant mountain range centered in the frame. The scene then shifts from moderate vegetation to a grassy bank as the camera approaches a wide river under an overcast sky. Finally, the movement culminates as Geralt steps from the land into the water, with the mountains remaining visible to the left.
